Thanks for the PR! A short checklist before you hit "Create":

- One logical change per PR.
- Tests cover the new behaviour (or explain why they don't).
- `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `## [Unreleased]` for user-visible changes.
- `npm run lint && npm test` is green locally.
